description: Repository-level checks for Anthropic-style skill packaging and Claude Code-ready skill metadata.

cases.prompt: Audit the portable skills directory for valid Anthropic-style skill packages.
assertions: Every immediate child directory under skills/ contains SKILL.md.
Each SKILL.md begins with YAML frontmatter.
Each frontmatter block contains name and description.
The frontmatter name matches the skill directory name.

cases.prompt: Audit the Claude Code skill directory against the portable skills directory.
assertions: .claude/skills and skills contain the same immediate skill directory names.
Claude Code skill metadata uses the current certificate-skills MCP server prefix.
No legacy MCP server-name references remain.

cases.prompt: Audit skill package layout for progressive disclosure.
assertions: Reusable detailed material lives in references/ when present.
Relative links from SKILL.md resolve to files inside the same skill package.
Skill directory and frontmatter names are lowercase hyphenated.
Portable skills do not duplicate repository installation instructions.
Portable skill descriptions match the trigger-oriented Claude Code skill descriptions.
